title: Angels Wash Their Faces
writer: Michael Fessier, Niven Busch, Robert Buckner
actors: Ann Sheridan, Billy Halop, Bernard Punsly
plot: A former inmate tries to start anew but gets entangled with mobsters and crooked officials, leading to his false accusation of arson and homicide. His struggle to clear his name and break free from the criminal underworld unfolds.
